**Privacy-Preserving External Request:**

The goal is to create a chat interface where users can input messages, and the system sends them to the specified endpoint to get responses, then displays both user and bot messages in a chat container.

The current implementation uses a different endpoint ("https://chatgptbot.space/api/v1/chat/result"), so the task is to replace that with the provided endpoints while maintaining the same functionality.

Please provide guidance on how to structure the request using the new endpoints, including any necessary authentication, WebSocket handling, or API format changes.
